subtitle: AI Stylist | Virtual Try-On | Personal Recommendations

description.zh-CN:
XunShang is your AI-powered personal style consultant.

[Core Features]
- AI Stylist: Get personalized outfit recommendations based on your body type, skin tone, and style preferences. Our AI understands weather, occasions, and your unique profile.
- Virtual Try-On: See yourself wearing recommended outfits before you buy. Upload a photo and let AI generate realistic try-on effects.
- Smart Recommendations: Discover new styles daily with our personalized feed that learns from your preferences and browsing behavior.
- Personal Style Profile: Complete a fun visual quiz to establish your style DNA - color season, body type analysis, and preferred aesthetics.
- Shopping Made Easy: From recommendation to purchase in seconds. Smart size recommendations based on your body measurements.
- Weather-Aware: Outfit suggestions automatically factor in your local weather conditions.

[Why XunShang?]
- AI-powered personalization that gets better over time
- No more outfit decision fatigue
- Virtual try-on saves time and reduces returns
- Style education through color theory and body type analysis
- Curated fashion from trusted brands and independent designers

Download XunShang and never wonder what to wear again.

keywords.zh-CN: outfit,AI stylist,virtual try-on,fashion recommendation,style,wardrobe,outfit planner,image consulting,color matching,clothing
